Title: Duplicate Advisory: .NET Denial of Service Vulnerability
Description:
### Duplicate Advisory
This advisory has been withdrawn because it is a duplicate of GHSA-73j8-2gch-69rq. This link is maintained to preserve external references.

### Original Description
Out-of-bounds read in .NET allows an unauthorized attacker to deny service over a network.
AffectedVersions: All versions starting from 9.0.0 up to 9.0.13
Solution: Unfortunately, there is no solution available yet.
